CustomField.description: A flag indicating that the Bizible fields on the Account record (BillingCountry, BillingState, Industry, Number_of_Sellers, Territory_Segment_Override__c, Verticale__c). This will notify the BizibleFieldsBatch process that the account and its contacts need to be updated. Once updated, the BizibleFieldsBatch will reset the flag to unchecked.
CustomField.label: Bizible Fields Changed
